title: eurya latifolia var. variegata
intro: Eurya latifolia var. variegata, also known as the Variegated Eurya or Yellow Eurya, is a plant species belonging to the Euryaceae family and native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eurya latifolia var. variegata include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to prevent diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
